response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience with C++ from his role at National Instruments, but his recent work has been primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and Dlang. While he demonstrates strong technical depth and problem-solving skills, his recent focus does not align closely with the C++ and industrial automation requirements of the role. His lack of exposure to IEC 62443 and cloud platforms like Microsoft Azure further reduces his fit.
strengths: Strong C++ experience from National Instruments (LabWindows/CVI)
Proven track record in building scalable, high-performance systems (e.g., Optilyz, re:cinq)
Extensive knowledge of secure development practices and agile methodologies
concerns: Lack of recent C++ development experience (last significant role was 2014-2015)
No demonstrated experience with IEC 62443 or industrial cybersecurity standards
Limited exposure to cloud technologies (Azure) or industrial automation protocols

key_factors.factor: Recent technical alignment with role requirements
